intro: Odontophyllum benoistii, also known as the toothbrush tree or toothbrush plant, is a species of plant that belongs to the family Annonaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, with potential health benefits including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The bioactive constituents of Odontophyllum benoistii include annonaceous acetogenins, alkaloids, and phenolic compounds, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
